body_txt: Someone makes a comment about X. Someone else replies, "This is Y," indicating that X wouldn't happen in/at/during Y (or would happen there, but they are somewhere else). For example, Alice says "I hope the bulls don't run us over." Bob rolls his eyes and says "This is Italy. The running of the bulls is in Spain." Compare with This Is Reality . Might also become a Captain Obvious . Not to be confused with Who Do You Think You Are?
